name: Formula One 1991
attribution: Historical data derived from f1db (github.com/f1db/f1db, CC BY 4.0)
AI ratings from 'Custom AI by jusk - F1 1991 Season' v0.6 (F-Classic_Gen4.xml), matching the F1_Season_1991 skinpack (jusk / Alain Fry style)
notes: Class: the 1991 grid runs on F-Classic_Gen4 (the era's V12/V10/V8 models plus the McLaren MP4/6), per data/rules/f1-class-season-map.json.

Model bindings are derived from the deployed F1_Season_1991 override DDS sets: g4m1 (V12) carries Ferrari/Dallara/Minardi/Ligier and the Modena-Team Lamborghini, g4m2 (V10) carries Williams/Lotus/Leyton House/Jordan, g4m3 (V8) carries Tyrrell/Brabham/Footwork/Benetton/Fondmetal/Lola, and mclaren_mp46 carries McLaren. The local deployment carries no DDS for AGS (#17/#18) or Coloni (#31), so those two teams are bound by authorship: both are Ford-Cosworth V8 entries, mapped to formula_classic_g4m3 like the model's other Ford V8 cars.

Team name 'Footwork-Porsche' follows the source AI livery. Footwork ran the Porsche V12 in rounds 1-6 and switched to Ford-Cosworth power from round 7; the pack format binds one team name per entry, so the Porsche-era name and model (formula_classic_g4m3) cover all 16 rounds, matching the source XML's single Footwork livery set.

Team 'Lambo-Lamborghini' in the source AI (#34/#35) is f1db constructor 'modena' (Modena Team SpA, the Lamborghini works entry running the Lambo 291); the pack uses the source livery name verbatim and the f1db constructor for lineage.

Coverage: the following f1db 1991 entrants never took a race start (DNQ/DNPQ every round they entered) and have a source AI livery, so they are carried as entries but appear in no round's grid: Alex Caffi (Footwork #10, rounds 9-16 Ford stint, 2 starts came earlier), the AGS #18 pairing Fabrizio Barbazza and Stefan Johansson, the Coloni #31 pairing Pedro Chaves and Naoki Hattori, Julian Bailey (Lotus #12) beyond his single start, Michael Bartels (Lotus #12), and Eric van de Poele (Modena #35) beyond his single start. Every driver who started at least one round is seated in that round's grid.

Source-XML data-entry bug (NOT propagated): the AGS #18 entries swap name and livery_name, livery 'AGS-Ford #18 S. Johansson' carries name 'Fabrizio Barbazza' and livery 'AGS-Ford #18 F. Barbazza' carries name 'Stefan Johansson'. The pack pairs each driver with the correctly-numbered livery per f1db (both drove #18): Barbazza's entry uses 'AGS-Ford #18 F. Barbazza', Johansson's uses 'AGS-Ford #18 S. Johansson'.

The source custom-AI XML carries no per-track (tracks="...") override entries; every round's aiOverrides is empty. Per-round livery texture variants shipped by the skinpack (e.g. McLaren1_Silverstone, Williams5_Brazil, Ligier25_Monaco) are cosmetic and outside the pack format.
